title: bromelica cepacea
intro: Bromelica cepacea, also known as Althernanthea cepacea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant contains bromelain, a mixture of proteolytic enzymes with medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bromelica cepacea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Bromelain can be obtained through herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, or extracts, and is also found in pineapple and other tropical plants.
